units.source_text: 根據在2025年股東周年⼤會上批准的薪酬政策，有關的⻑期獎勵釐定為郭珮瑛基本薪⾦的600%與艾橋智基本薪⾦的600%。股份數⽬乃參照⾃2025年2⽉24⽇起⼀
units.translation_target_text: According to the remuneration policy approved at the 2025 annual general meeting, the relevant periodic incentives are determined to be 600% of Guo Peiying’s basic salary and 600% of Ai Qiaozhi’s basic salary. The number of shares is based on the date from February 24, 2025
units.translation_en: According to the remuneration policy approved at the 2025 annual general meeting, the relevant periodic incentives are determined to be 600% of Guo Peiying’s basic salary and 600% of Ai Qiaozhi’s basic salary. The number of shares is based on the date from February 24, 2025

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: According to the remuneration policy approved at the 2025 annual general meeting, the relevant periodic incentives are determined to be 600% of Guo Peiying’s basic salary and 600% of Ai Qiaozhi’s basic salary. The number of shares is based on the date from February 24, 2025

units.source_text: 星期的平均收市價（9.07英鎊），該價格與就2024業績年度授予的其他獎勵所⽤價格相同，並按滙豐於實際授出期間的預期股息收益率每年6.5%予以折讓的股價
units.translation_target_text: Weekly average closing price (£9.07), which is the same price used for other awards granted in respect of the 2024 performance year and discounted by HSBC’s expected dividend yield of 6.5% per annum during the actual grant period
units.translation_en: Weekly average closing price (£9.07), which is the same price used for other awards granted in respect of the 2024 performance year and discounted by HSBC’s expected dividend yield of 6.5% per annum during the actual grant period

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: Weekly average closing price (£9.07), which is the same price used for other awards granted in respect of the 2024 performance year and discounted by HSBC’s expected dividend yield of 6.5% per annum during the actual grant period

units.source_text: （6.58英鎊）釐定。根據IFRS 2會計準則，該獎勵的公允值為3.185英鎊。⻑期獎勵為有條件的股份獎勵，附帶三年前瞻性業績計算期，且於授出⽇期的第三周年⾄
units.translation_target_text: (£6.58) determined. The fair value of the award under IFRS 2 accounting standard is £3.185. The second term award is a conditional share award, with a three-year forward-looking performance calculation period, and will expire on the third anniversary of the date of grant.
units.translation_en: (£6.58) determined. The fair value of the award under IFRS 2 accounting standard is £3.185. The second term award is a conditional share award, with a three-year forward-looking performance calculation period, and will expire on the third anniversary of the date of grant.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: (£6.58) determined. The fair value of the award under IFRS 2 accounting standard is £3.185. The second term award is a conditional share award, with a three-year forward-looking performance calculation period, and will expire on the third anniversary of the date of grant.

units.source_text: 第七周年期間按等額分五期每年實際授出，唯須達成所需表現⽅可作實。獎勵在授出⽇期起計最⻑⼗年期間內須受撤回條款限制，且無權享有等同股息額。
units.translation_target_text: During the seventh anniversary period, the funds will be awarded in five equal installments each year, subject to achieving the required performance. Awards are subject to a withdrawal clause for a period of up to ten years from the date of grant and are not entitled to equivalent dividend amounts.
units.translation_en: During the seventh anniversary period, the funds will be awarded in five equal installments each year, subject to achieving the required performance. Awards are subject to a withdrawal clause for a period of up to ten years from the date of grant and are not entitled to equivalent dividend amounts.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: During the seventh anniversary period, the funds will be awarded in five equal installments each year, subject to achieving the required performance. Awards are subject to a withdrawal clause for a period of up to ten years from the date of grant and are not entitled to equivalent dividend amounts.

units.source_text: 2 即期股份獎勵基於往年表現授出，作為周年獎勵的⼀部分，並且不受前瞻性表現條件限制。於實際授出時，獎勵將附帶⼀年禁售期。獎勵的⾯值乃採⽤⾃2025年2
units.translation_target_text: 2 Current share awards are granted based on performance in previous years as part of annual awards and are not subject to forward-looking performance conditions. When actually awarded, the reward will be subject to a one-year lock-up period. The face value of the award is as of February 2025
units.translation_en: 2 Current share awards are granted based on performance in previous years as part of annual awards and are not subject to forward-looking performance conditions. When actually awarded, the reward will be subject to a one-year lock-up period. The face value of the award is as of February 2025

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: 2 Current share awards are granted based on performance in previous years as part of annual awards and are not subject to forward-looking performance conditions. When actually awarded, the reward will be subject to a one-year lock-up period. The face value of the award is as of February 2025

units.source_text: ⽉24⽇起⼀星期的平均收市價9.07英鎊計算。根據IFRS 2會計準則，該獎勵的公允值為9.163英鎊。獎勵於授出⽇期起計須受為期最⻑⼗年的撤回條款限制。
units.translation_target_text: Calculated based on the average closing price in the week starting from March 24th, which is 9.07 pounds. The fair value of the award under IFRS 2 accounting standards is £9.163. Awards are subject to a withdrawal clause of up to ten years from the date of grant.
units.translation_en: Calculated based on the average closing price in the week starting from March 24th, which is 9.07 pounds. The fair value of the award under IFRS 2 accounting standards is £9.163. Awards are subject to a withdrawal clause of up to ten years from the date of grant.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: Calculated based on the average closing price in the week starting from March 24th, which is 9.07 pounds. The fair value of the award under IFRS 2 accounting standards is £9.163. Awards are subject to a withdrawal clause of up to ten years from the date of grant.
